The .text section contains a long sequence of instructions with many conditional and unconditional jumps; a number of local labels (e.g., <usleep@plt+...>) indicate branch targets.

Because function boundaries are not explicitly marked, the CFG may merge unrelated code; confidence is reduced due to the lack of symbol names and exact call/ret pairing.
Despite this, the major control-flow backbone from the entry point through the main logic to exit can be reconstructed with moderate confidence.
